page.title: Security
page.description: Manage your password, connected accounts, active sessions, and account deletion.

connectedAccounts.description: Sign in with any connected account. Your primary email stays the same.
connectedAccounts.cannotDisconnect: You need at least one sign-in method.

password.errorTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
password.errorFailed: Failed to update password. Check your current password and try again.

activityLog.description: All devices currently signed in to your account.

dangerZone.deleteDescription: Permanently deletes your account, projects, API keys, and all data. This cannot be undone.

errors.revokeFailed: Failed to revoke session. Try again.
